# Sidebar - ASCII Wireframe

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐

## Sidebar - Detailed Component Breakdown

### 1. Layout Structure

```
┌──────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  #sidebar (Fixed position)                          │
│  ┌──────────────────────────────────────────────────┐│
│  │  .sidebar-header (Header section)               ││
│  │  ┌────────────────────────────────────────────┐ ││
│  │  │  #sidebar-logo (Logo)                     │ ││
│  │  │  #sidebar-school-name (School name)       │ ││
│  │  │  #sidebar-school-subtitle (Subtitle)      │ ││
│  │  └────────────────────────────────────────────┘ ││
│  │                                                  ││
│  │  #sidebar-nav (Navigation - scrollable)         ││
│  │  ┌────────────────────────────────────────────┐ ││
│  │  │  .nav-section (Section group)             │ ││
│  │  │  ┌──────────────────────────────────────┐ │ ││
│  │  │  │  .nav-section-title (Section title) │ │ ││
│  │  │  │  .nav-section-arrow (▾)            │ │ ││
│  │  │  ├──────────────────────────────────────┤ │ ││
│  │  │  │  .nav-section-items (Items)         │ │ ││
│  │  │  │  ┌────────────────────────────────┐ │ │ ││
│  │  │  │  │  .nav-item (Navigation item)   │ │ │ ││
│  │  │  │  │  .nav-icon (Icon)             │ │ │ ││
│  │  │  │  │  .nav-label (Label)           │ │ │ ││
│  │  │  │  └────────────────────────────────┘ │ │ ││
│  │  │  └──────────────────────────────────────┘ │ ││
│  │  └────────────────────────────────────────────┘ ││
│  │                                                  ││
│  │  .sidebar-footer (Footer section)               ││
│  │  ┌────────────────────────────────────────────┐ ││
│  │  │  #sidebar-avatar (User avatar)            │ ││
│  │  │  #sidebar-username (User name)            │ ││
│  │  │  #sidebar-userrole (User role)            │ ││
│  │  │  #sidebar-logout (Logout button)          │ ││
│  │  └────────────────────────────────────────────┘ ││
│  └──────────────────────────────────────────────────┘│
└──────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

### 2. Component Specifications

#### A. Header Section
```html
<div class="sidebar-header">
    <div class="sidebar-logo" id="sidebar-logo">
        <img src="/assets/images/school-logo.png" alt="School Logo">
    </div>
    <div class="sidebar-school-name">
        ECOLE LA FONTAINE
        <small id="sidebar-school-subtitle">School Management</small>
    </div>
</div>
```

| Element | Size | Description |
|---------|------|-------------|
| Logo | 40px × 40px | School logo image |
| School Name | 0.85rem | Bold, Syne font |
| Subtitle | 0.7rem | Muted text, DM Sans |

#### B. Navigation Section
```html
<nav class="sidebar-nav" id="sidebar-nav">
    <!-- Section 1 -->
    <div class="nav-section">
        <div class="nav-section-title" onclick="toggleSection(this)">
            🏠 Dashboard & Overview
            <span class="nav-section-arrow">▾</span>
        </div>
        <div class="nav-section-items">
            <div class="nav-item active" onclick="navigateTo('admin-dashboard')">
                <span class="nav-icon">📊</span>
                <span>Dashboard</span>
            </div>
            <div class="nav-item" onclick="navigateTo('analytics')">
                <span class="nav-icon">📈</span>
                <span>Analytics</span>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
    
    <!-- Section 2 -->
    <div class="nav-section">
        <div class="nav-section-title" onclick="toggleSection(this)">
            🔔 Communication
            <span class="nav-section-arrow">▾</span>
        </div>
        <div class="nav-section-items">
            <div class="nav-item" onclick="navigateTo('announcements')">
                <span class="nav-icon">📢</span>
                <span>Announcements</span>
            </div>
            <!-- More items... -->
        </div>
    </div>
    <!-- More sections... -->
</nav>
```

#### C. Navigation Item States
```css
/* Default */
.nav-item {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--sm);
    padding: var(--sm) var(--md);
    border-radius: var(--r-md);
    color: var(--text-secondary);
    transition: all var(--transition);
    cursor: pointer;
}

/* Hover */
.nav-item:hover {
    background: var(--bg-tertiary);
    color: var(--text-primary);
}

/* Active */
.nav-item.active {
    background: var(--role-light);
    color: var(--role-primary);
    font-weight: 600;
}

/* Icon */
.nav-icon {
    font-size: 1.1rem;
    flex-shrink: 0;
    width: 24px;
    text-align: center;
}
```

#### D. Section Toggle
```css
.nav-section-title {
    font-size: 0.65rem;
    font-weight: 600;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 1px;
    color: var(--text-muted);
    padding: var(--sm) var(--md) var(--xs);
    cursor: pointer;
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    align-items: center;
}

.nav-section-arrow {
    transition: transform var(--transition);
    font-size: 0.6rem;
}

.nav-section.collapsed .nav-section-arrow {
    transform: rotate(-90deg);
}

.nav-section-items {
    overflow: hidden;
    transition: max-height 0.3s ease;
    max-height: 800px;
}

.nav-section.collapsed .nav-section-items {
    max-height: 0;
}
```

#### E. Footer Section
```html
<div class="sidebar-footer">
    <div class="sidebar-user-avatar" id="sidebar-avatar">👤</div>
    <div class="sidebar-user-info">
        <div class="sidebar-user-name" id="sidebar-username">Administrator</div>
        <div class="sidebar-user-role" id="sidebar-userrole">Admin</div>
    </div>
    <button class="sidebar-logout" onclick="logout()">🚪</button>
</div>
```

### 3. CSS Variables

```css
:root {
    /* Sidebar dimensions */
    --sidebar-w: 280px;
    --sidebar-w-collapsed: 80px;
    
    /* Colors */
    --sidebar-bg: var(--bg-secondary);
    --sidebar-border: var(--border-light);
    --sidebar-shadow: var(--shadow-md);
    
    /* Spacing */
    --sidebar-header-h: 64px;
    --sidebar-footer-h: 60px;
}
```

### 4. Collapsed State

```css
@media (min-width: 1025px) {
    .sidebar.collapsed {
        width: var(--sidebar-w-collapsed);
    }
    
    .sidebar.collapsed .sidebar-school-name,
    .sidebar.collapsed .nav-item span:not(.nav-icon),
    .sidebar.collapsed .sidebar-user-info,
    .sidebar.collapsed .nav-section-title span:first-child {
        display: none;
    }
    
    .sidebar.collapsed .nav-item {
        justify-content: center;
        padding: var(--sm);
    }
    
    .sidebar.collapsed .nav-section-title {
        justify-content: center;
    }
    
    .sidebar.collapsed .sidebar-footer {
        justify-content: center;
    }
}
```

### 5. Mobile State

```css
@media (max-width: 768px) {
    .sidebar {
        transform: translateX(-100%);
        width: var(--sidebar-w);
    }
    
    .sidebar.mobile-open {
        transform: translateX(0);
    }
    
    /* Overlay */
    .sidebar-overlay {
        position: fixed;
        top: 0;
        left: 0;
        right: 0;
        bottom: 0;
        background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5);
        z-index: calc(var(--z-high) - 1);
        display: none;
    }
    
    .sidebar-overlay.active {
        display: block;
    }
}
```

### 6. Navigation Configuration

```javascript
const NAV_CONFIG = {
    admin: [
        {
            section: '🏠 Dashboard & Overview',
            items: [
                { id: 'admin-dashboard', icon: '📊', label: 'Dashboard' },
                { id: 'analytics', icon: '📈', label: 'Analytics' }
            ]
        },
        {
            section: '🔔 Communication',
            items: [
                { id: 'announcements', icon: '📢', label: 'Announcements' },
                { id: 'notification-center', icon: '🔔', label: 'Notification Center' },
                { id: 'reminders', icon: '⏰', label: 'Reminders' }
            ]
        },
        // ... more sections
    ],
    teacher: [
        // Teacher-specific navigation
    ],
    accountant: [
        // Accountant-specific navigation
    ]
};
```

### 7. Build Sidebar Function

```javascript
function buildSidebar(role) {
    const navContainer = document.getElementById('sidebar-nav');
    if (!navContainer) return;
    
    const config = NAV_CONFIG[role] || [];
    
    navContainer.innerHTML = config.map(section => `
        <div class="nav-section" id="sec-${section.section.replace(/\s/g, '')}">
            <div class="nav-section-title" onclick="toggleSection(this.parentElement)">
                ${section.section}
                <span class="nav-section-arrow">▾</span>
            </div>
            <div class="nav-section-items">
                ${section.items.map(item => `
                    <div class="nav-item" id="nav-${item.id}" onclick="navigateTo('${item.id}')">
                        <span class="nav-icon">${item.icon}</span>
                        <span>${item.label}</span>
                    </div>
                `).join('')}
            </div>
        </div>
    `).join('');
    
    // Restore collapsed sections
    restoreCollapsedSections();
}

function toggleSection(element) {
    element.classList.toggle('collapsed');
    saveCollapsedSections();
}

function saveCollapsedSections() {
    const collapsed = [];
    document.querySelectorAll('.nav-section.collapsed').forEach(s => {
        collapsed.push(s.id);
    });
    localStorage.setItem('sidebar_collapsed_sections', JSON.stringify(collapsed));
}

function restoreCollapsedSections() {
    try {
        const saved = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('sidebar_collapsed_sections') || '[]');
        saved.forEach(id => {
            const el = document.getElementById(id);
            if (el) el.classList.add('collapsed');
        });
    } catch (e) {}
}
```

### 8. File Structure

```
assets/
├── css/
│   └── components/
│       └── sidebar.css        # Sidebar styles
├── js/
│   └── components/
│       └── sidebar.js         # Sidebar logic
└── index.html
```

3. **Write the JavaScript** for navigation, section toggles, and user info?
4. **Move on to the Content Area** (the main page body)?

Which part would you like to tackle next?

# Teacher Dashboard - Selected Features with ASCII Wireframes

Here are all your selected features visualized with ASCII wireframes:

---

## A1 - Real Completion Rate (Fixed)

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  📊 MARKS COMPLETION RATE                                                  │
│  ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐   │
│  │                                                                     │   │
│  │  380 / 413 slots filled                                             │   │
│  │  ████████████████████████████████████████░░░░░░░░░  92%             │   │
│  │                                                                     │   │
│  │  ✅ 380 marks entered    ⏳ 33 marks remaining                      │   │
│  │  📅 Current Term: Term 2                                            │   │
│  │                                                                     │   │
│  └─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘   │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

**Formula:**
```
completionPct = actual_marks_entered / total_possible_marks × 100

Where:
  total_possible_marks = SUM(students_in_class × assessments_per_class)
  actual_marks_entered = COUNT(marks records) for those assessments
  Locked assessments = 100% complete
```

---

## A2 - Per-Assessment Completion Bars

```

# Accountant Dashboard - Complete Feature List & Options

## Current Accountant Dashboard Features (From Your Code)

Here are all the features currently in your accountant dashboard:

### STAT CARDS (Top Row)
1. **Total Fees** - Total fees for current term
2. **Collected** - Total amount collected
3. **Pending** - Outstanding balance
4. **Overdue Students** - Students with overdue payments
5. **Collection Rate** - Percentage of fees collected

### COLLECTION BY CLASS CHART
6. **Bar Chart** - Expected vs Collected per class (Chart.js)

### RECENT PAYMENTS TABLE
7. **Payment List** - Date, Student, Amount, Receipt number

### OVERDUE PAYMENTS TABLE
8. **Overdue List** - Student, Class, Balance, Days overdue, Action button

### QUICK ACTIONS
9. Record Payment
10. Receipts
11. Student Fees
12. Fee Structure
13. Financial Reports
14. Overdue Payments

---

## New Features You Can Add (Choose What You Want)

### 🎯 Category A: Real-Time Notifications

| # | Feature | Description | Effort |
|---|---------|-------------|--------|
| A1 | **Live Payment Feed** | Real-time notifications when admin records a payment | Medium |
| A2 | **Payment Alert Badge** | Bell icon shows unread payment notifications | Low |
| A3 | **Click-to-Receipt** | Click notification to view receipt directly | Low |
| A4 | **Daily Digest** | Summary of today's payments and overdue | Low |
| A5 | **Admin Activity Log** | See which payments were recorded by admin | Low |

### 📊 Category B: Enhanced Analytics

| # | Feature | Description | Effort |
|---|---------|-------------|--------|
| B1 | **Monthly Trend ASCII** | Vertical bar chart showing collection trends (no Chart.js) | Medium |
| B2 | **Overdue Severity Chart** | 4 bands: Critical, High, Medium, Recent | Medium |
| B3 | **Collection by Payment Method** | Pie/donut chart of Cash, Mobile, Bank, Cheque | Medium |
| B4 | **Class Collection Ranking** | Classes sorted by collection rate | Low |
| B5 | **Daily Collection** | Today's collections vs yesterday | Low |
| B6 | **Week-over-Week Change** | Compare this week to last week | Medium |

### 📋 Category C: Payment Management

| # | Feature | Description | Effort |
|---|---------|-------------|--------|
| C1 | **Bulk Payment Entry** | Record multiple payments at once | High |
| C2 | **Payment Reversal Quick Action** | Reverse a payment with one click | Medium |
| C3 | **Receipt Preview** | Preview receipt before printing | Low |
| C4 | **Payment Notes** | Add notes to payments | Low |
| C5 | **Payment Method Filter** | Filter payments by method | Low |
| C6 | **Export Receipts** | Bulk export receipts as PDF | High |

### 🔔 Category D: Overdue Management

| # | Feature | Description | Effort |
|---|---------|-------------|--------|
| D1 | **Overdue Severity Bands** | Color-coded by days overdue | Low |
| D2 | **Overdue Trend** | Show if overdue is increasing/decreasing | Low |
| D3 | **Bulk Overdue Reminders** | Send reminders to all overdue students | High |
| D4 | **Overdue by Class** | Which classes have most overdue | Low |
| D5 | **Overdue Payment Plan** | Suggest payment plans | High |

### 💰 Category E: Fee Structure

| # | Feature | Description | Effort |
|---|---------|-------------|--------|
| E1 | **Fee Category Breakdown** | Show fees by category | Low |
| E2 | **Fee Amount Override** | Override fee for specific class | Medium |
| E3 | **Fee History** | See fee changes over time | Medium |
| E4 | **Bulk Fee Assignment** | Assign fees to multiple classes | High |
| E5 | **Fee Template** | Save and apply fee templates | High |

### 📈 Category F: Financial Reports

| # | Feature | Description | Effort |
|---|---------|-------------|--------|
| F1 | **Executive Summary** | Top-level financial summary | Low |
| F2 | **Collection Rate by Class** | Table with rates per class | Low |
| F3 | **Payment Method Summary** | Total by payment method | Low |
| F4 | **Monthly Revenue** | Revenue by month | Medium |
| F5 | **Year-over-Year Comparison** | Compare this year to last | High |
| F6 | **Export to Excel** | Export any table to Excel | Low |

### 🎨 Category G: UI/UX Enhancements

| # | Feature | Description | Effort |
|---|---------|-------------|--------|
| G1 | **Refresh Button** | Manual refresh without reloading | Low |
| G2 | **Date Range Filter** | Filter payments by date | Medium |
| G3 | **Search Students** | Quick search in overdue list | Low |
| G4 | **Print Dashboard** | Print dashboard view | Low |
| G5 | **Mobile Responsive** | Works on tablets and phones | Medium |
| G6 | **Dark Mode** | Toggle dark/light theme | Low |

### 🔧 Category H: Settings & Preferences

| # | Feature | Description | Effort |
|---|---------|-------------|--------|

| H4 | **Dashboard Widgets** | Choose which widgets to show | Medium |

### Option 3: Minimal Viable
```
A1, A2, A4, B1, B2, D1
```
- Just the essentials

### Option 4: Custom Selection
Pick any combination of codes (e.g., "A1, A2, B1, B2, C1, D1, F1")

---

## Your Choice?

Please reply with:

1. **"Option 1"** - For the recommended set
2. **"Option 2"** - For everything
3. **"Option 3"** - For minimal set
4. **A list of codes** - For custom selection (e.g., "A1, A2, A4, B1, B2, B3, D1, D2, F2, G1")

Once you choose, I'll generate the complete Accountant Dashboard HTML, CSS, and JavaScript with all selected features.

# Analytics Dashboard - Complete Feature List & Options

## Current Analytics Features (From Your Code)

Here are all the features currently in your analytics module:

### CHARTS & VISUALIZATIONS
1. **Term Performance Comparison** - Line chart comparing class performance across terms
2. **Subject Performance by Term** - Table showing subject averages per term with trends
3. **Teacher Performance Ranking** - Table ranking teachers by class average

### DATA SOURCES
4. **Term Filter** - Select which terms to display
5. **Export Report** - Export analytics to Excel

## New Analytics Features You Can Add (Choose What You Want)

### 📊 Category A: Core Analytics

| # | Feature | Description | Effort |
|---|---------|-------------|--------|
| A1 | **Class Performance Trends** | Line chart showing each class performance over terms | Medium |
| A2 | **Subject Performance Heatmap** | Color-coded grid showing subject performance by class | Medium |
| A3 | **Student Performance Distribution** | Histogram showing grade distribution across all students | Medium |
| A4 | **Pass/Fail Analysis** | Pass/fail rates by class and subject | Low |
| A5 | **Top/Bottom Student Lists** | Lists of highest and lowest performing students | Low |
| A6 | **Class Ranking** | Rank classes by overall performance | Low |
| A7 | **Term Comparison** | Compare metrics across terms side by side | Low |

### 📈 Category B: Trend Analysis

| # | Feature | Description | Effort |
|---|---------|-------------|--------|
| B1 | **Year-over-Year Comparison** | Compare current year to previous years | High |
| B2 | **Performance Forecasting** | Simple trend line showing projected performance | High |
| B3 | **Subject Trend Analysis** | Track subject performance over time | Medium |
| B4 | **Teacher Impact Score** | Measure teacher impact on student performance | Medium |
| B5 | **Class Performance Trajectory** | Show class improvement over time | Medium |
| B6 | **Assessment Difficulty Analysis** | Compare assessment difficulty across subjects | High |

### 👥 Category C: Student Analytics

| # | Feature | Description | Effort |
|---|---------|-------------|--------|

Once you choose, I'll generate the complete Analytics Dashboard HTML, CSS, and JavaScript with all selected features.

## Complete Notification Types & Their Actions

### 1. 🔴 URGENT / CRITICAL
```
╔═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╗
║  ⚠️ CRITICAL: Academic Performance Alert                               ║
║  ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ║
║  • Class average dropped below threshold (e.g., <70%)                 ║
║  • Multiple students failing                                          ║
║  • Assessment not completed by deadline                              ║
║                                                                       ║
║  Actions: View Details → Notify Teachers → Generate Report           ║
║  Priority: High (real-time push)                                    ║
╚═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╝
```

### 2. 💰 PAYMENT
```
╔═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╗
║  💵 Payment Recorded                                                    ║
║  ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ║
║  • Admin records payment → Accountant notification                     ║
║  • Accountant records payment → Admin notification                     ║
║  • Parent makes payment → Admin notification                          ║
║                                                                       ║
║  Actions: View Receipt → View Student → Add to Report                ║
║  Priority: Medium (push notification)                                 ║
╚═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╝
```

### 3. 📢 ANNOUNCEMENT
```
╔═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╗
║  📢 System Announcement                                                 ║
║  ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ║
║  • Exam schedules                                                     ║
║  • School events                                                      ║
║  • Policy changes                                                     ║
║  • Holiday notices                                                    ║
║                                                                       ║
║  Actions: View Details → Add to Calendar → Share                     ║
║  Priority: Varies (depends on urgency)                               ║
╚═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╝
```

### 4. 📝 MARKS
```
╔═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╗
║  ✏️ Marks Entry Update                                                  ║
║  ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ║
║  • Teacher completes marks entry                                      ║
║  • Assessment locked by admin                                         ║
║  • Marks imported from Excel                                          ║
║  • Assessment unlocked for editing                                    ║
║                                                                       ║
║  Actions: View Marks → Generate Report → Lock/Unlock                ║
║  Priority: Medium                                                    ║
╚═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╝
```

### 5. 🔒 SYSTEM
```
╔═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╗
║  🔒 System & Security                                                  ║
║  ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ║
║  • Assessment locked/unlocked                                         ║
║  • Backup completed                                                   ║
║  • System maintenance                                                 ║
║  • User login from new device                                         ║
║  • API configuration changed                                          ║
║                                                                       ║
║  Actions: View Details → Download Backup → Review Log                ║
║  Priority: Varies                                                    ║
╚═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╝
```

### 6. 👥 STUDENT
```
╔═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╗
║  🎓 Student Management                                                 ║
║  ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ║
║  • New student enrolled                                               ║
║  • Student promoted to next class                                     ║
║  • Student transferred                                                ║
║  • Student graduated                                                  ║
║  • Student archived                                                   ║
║                                                                       ║
║  Actions: View Student → Assign Fees → Generate Schedule            ║
║  Priority: Medium                                                    ║
╚═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╝
```

### 7. ⏰ REMINDER
```
╔═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╗
║  ⏰ Deadline Reminder                                                   ║
║  ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ║
║  • Fee payment due                                                    ║
║  • Assessment submission deadline                                     ║
║  • Parent-teacher meeting                                             ║
║  • School event                                                       ║
║  • Assignment due                                                     ║
║                                                                       ║
║  Actions: Record Payment → View Details → Snooze                    ║
║  Priority: Medium                                                    ║
╚═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╝
```

### 8. 📊 REPORT
```
╔═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╗
║  📊 Report Generated                                                    ║
║  ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ║
║  • Weekly performance report                                           ║
║  • Financial report                                                    ║
║  • Attendance report                                                   ║
║  • Grade distribution report                                           ║

```

### 9. 💰 OVERDUE
```
╔═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╗
║  ⚠️ Overdue Payment Alert                                               ║
║  ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ║
║  • Student fee overdue (7+ days)                                      ║
║  • Critical overdue (30+ days)                                        ║
║  • Payment plan required                                              ║
║  • Collection reminder                                                ║
║                                                                       ║
║  Actions: Record Payment → Send Reminder → View History              ║
║  Priority: High → Critical                                            ║
╚═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╝
```

```
╔═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╗

║  ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ║

## Advanced Features Included

### 🔔 Real-time Push Notifications
```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  🔔 REAL-TIME PUSH NOTIFICATIONS                                            │
│  ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐   │
│  │  • Browser push notifications (Chrome, Firefox, Safari)             │   │
│  │  • Mobile push notifications (iOS, Android via PWA)                 │   │
│  │  • Email notifications (optional)                                  │   │
│  │  • SMS notifications for critical alerts (optional)               │   │
│  │  • Sound alerts for urgent notifications                           │   │
│  └─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘   │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

### 🏷️ Notification Categories & Priority
```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  🏷️ CATEGORY & PRIORITY SYSTEM                                             │
│  ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐   │
│  │  Priority Levels:                                                   │   │
│  │  • CRITICAL (🔴) → Immediate action required                       │   │
│  │  • HIGH (🟠) → Action needed within 24 hours                      │   │
│  │  • MEDIUM (🟡) → Action needed within 7 days                      │   │
│  │  • LOW (🟢) → Informational, no action required                   │   │
│  │                                                                     │   │
│  │  Categories:                                                       │   │
│  │  • Academic (Marks, Assessments, Reports)                          │   │
│  │  • Financial (Payments, Fees, Overdue)                             │   │
│  │  • Administrative (Students, Staff, Enrollment)                   │   │
│  │  • System (Backups, Security, Maintenance)                        │   │
│  │  • Communication (Announcements, Reminders)                       │   │
│  │  • Alerts (Urgent, Critical, Warnings)                            │   │
│  └─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘   │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

## Announcement Types & Status

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  🏷️ ANNOUNCEMENT TYPES & STATUS                                                             │
│  ┌───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐   │
│  │                                                                                       │   │
│  │  TYPES:                                                                               │   │
│  │  ┌─────────────┬──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐   │   │
│  │  │  🔴 URGENT   │  • Critical updates requiring immediate attention                │   │   │
│  │  │             │  • Displayed with red banner and exclamation mark                 │   │   │
│  │  │             │  • Push notification sent to all recipients                       │   │   │
│  │  │             │  • Example: Exam schedule change, emergency closure               │   │   │
│  │  ├─────────────┼──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤   │   │
│  │  │  📅 EVENT    │  • School events, meetings, activities                          │   │   │
│  │  │             │  • Displayed with calendar icon                                  │   │   │
│  │  │             │  • Add to calendar option                                        │   │   │
│  │  │             │  • Example: Sports day, Parent-teacher meeting                  │   │   │
│  │  ├─────────────┼──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤   │   │
│  │  │  📢 GENERAL  │  • Regular information and updates                             │   │   │
│  │  │             │  • Displayed with announcement icon                              │   │   │
│  │  │             │  • Standard notification                                        │   │   │
│  │  │             │  • Example: Holiday notice, new policies                        │   │   │
│  │  ├─────────────┼──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤   │   │
│  │  │  🔔 REMINDER │  • Upcoming deadlines and important dates                       │   │   │
│  │  │             │  • Displayed with bell icon                                     │   │   │
│  │  │             │  • Reminder notification                                        │   │   │
│  │  │             │  • Example: Fee payment deadline, submission deadline           │   │   │
│  │  └─────────────┴──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘   │   │
│  │                                                                                       │   │
│  │  STATUS:                                                                              │   │
│  │  ┌─────────────┬──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐   │   │
│  │  │  ✅ PUBLISHED│  • Visible to selected audience                                 │   │   │
│  │  │             │  • Sent to notification queue                                    │   │   │
│  │  │             │  • Can be edited (minor changes)                                 │   │   │
│  │  ├─────────────┼──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤   │   │
│  │  │  📝 DRAFT    │  • Only visible to creator and admin                           │   │   │
│  │  │             │  • Not sent to recipients                                       │   │   │
│  │  │             │  • Can be edited and published later                            │   │   │
│  │  ├─────────────┼──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤   │   │
│  │  │  ⏰ SCHEDULED│  • Will be published at specified date/time                    │   │   │
│  │  │             │  • Visible in "Scheduled" tab                                   │   │   │
│  │  │             │  • Can be cancelled or rescheduled                              │   │   │
│  │  ├─────────────┼──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤   │   │
│  │  │  📦 ARCHIVED│  • Hidden from main view                                       │   │   │
│  │  │             │  • Stored for historical reference                              │   │   │
│  │  │             │  • Can be restored if needed                                    │   │   │
│  │  └─────────────┴──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘   │   │
│  └───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘   │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

## Your Decision

The Student Management module is complete with all essential features covering:
1. **Student List** - View, search, filter, bulk actions
2. **Enroll Student** - Complete enrollment form with all fields
3. **Student Promotion** - Wizard with rules, class promotion, history
4. **Student Archive** - Archive management with restore and delete
5. **Student Details** - Full student profile with all related data

Would you like me to:

1. **Start building the code** for the Student Management module?
2. **Move on to the next page** (e.g., Marks Entry, Class Register)?
3. **Add any additional features** you think are missing?

## Your Decision

The Family Groups module is complete with all essential features covering:

1. **Family Management** - Create, edit, delete, view families
2. **Member Management** - Add, remove, link students
3. **Auto-Detect** - Find potential sibling groups
4. **Financial Features** - Fee summary, discounts, payments
5. **Advanced Operations** - Merge and split families
6. **Analytics** - Statistics, distribution, trends

Would you like me to:

1. **Start building the code** for the Family Groups module?
2. **Move on to the next page** (e.g., Fee Structure, Record Payment)?
3. **Add any additional features** you think are missing?

## Assessment Locking - ASCII Wireframe

```

## Your Decision

The Academics module is complete with all essential features covering:

1. **Marks Entry** - Full entry with validation, absent marking, grade distribution
2. **Class Register** - Student performance table with rankings
3. **Report Cards** - Individual and batch generation with QR codes
4. **Statistics** - School-wide, class, subject analysis
5. **Assessment Management** - Create, lock, track assessments
6. **Import/Export** - Excel import/export with validation

Would you like me to:

1. **Start building the code** for the Academics module?
2. **Move on to the next page** (e.g., Finance, Settings)?
3. **Add any additional features** you think are missing?

## Annual Register - ASCII Wireframe

│  └───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘   │

│  ┌───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐   │
│  │  🔍 FILTERS                                                                             │   │
│  │  ┌───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐   │

# Class Register & Report Cards - Complete ASCII Wireframes

## Class Register - 6 Formats

---

### 1. NURSERY - PRE-MIDTERM (Raw Scores, No Percentages)

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  📋 CLASS REGISTER — NURSERY 3 — PRE-MIDTERM                                               │
│  ┌───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐   │

│                                                                                               │
│  ┌───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐   │

│  │  │  ───┼────────────────────────┼───────┼───────┼───────┼───────┼───────┼─────────│   │   │
│  │  │  ╔═══╪════════════════════════╪═══════╪═══════╪═══════╪═══════╪═══════╪═════════╗   │   │

│  │  │  ║ 9 │ MUGISHA Paul          │ 15    │ 12    │ 10    │ 12.3  │ 🔴 D   │  9     ║   │   │

## Summary - 6 Formats Comparison

| Format | Nursery | Primary | Key Difference |
|--------|---------|---------|----------------|
| **Pre-Midterm** | Raw Scores (No %) | Percentages | Nursery uses raw scores, Primary uses % |
| **Post-Midterm** | MG + EX (Raw) | MG + EX (%) + Total | Nursery raw, Primary with percentages |
| **Annual** | 3 Terms (Raw) | 3 Terms (%) + Promotion | Nursery raw, Primary with % and promotion status |

### Sticky Columns in Tables:
- **Column 1:** Rank (#) - Sticky Left
- **Column 2:** Student Name - Sticky Left (after rank)

### Sticky Rows:
- **Header Row 1:** Subject Names
- **Header Row 2:** MG / EX Sub-Headers (Post-Midterm only)
- **Header Row 3:** Term Headers (Annual only)

---

## Summary - Class Register & Report Cards Formats

| Format | Class Register | Report Cards |
|--------|---------------|--------------|
| **Nursery Pre-Midterm** | ✅ French, Base subjects only | ✅ French, Base subjects only |
| **Nursery Post-Midterm** | ✅ French, MG+EX+Total | ✅ French, MG+EX+Total |
| **Nursery Annual** | ✅ French, Cumulative 3 terms | ✅ French, Cumulative 3 terms |
| **Primary Pre-Midterm** | ✅ English, Core subjects only | ✅ English, Core subjects only |
| **Primary Post-Midterm** | ✅ English, MG+EX+Total | ✅ English, MG+EX+Total |
| **Primary Annual** | ✅ English, Cumulative 3 terms | ✅ English, Cumulative 3 terms |

### Key Features:

| Feature | Class Register | Report Cards |
|---------|---------------|--------------|
| Sticky Columns (Rank, Name) | ✅ | N/A |
| Sticky Header Rows | ✅ | N/A |
| QR Code | ❌ | ✅ (Right side, above footer) |
| Promotion Decision | ❌ | ✅ (Annual only) |
| French/English Support | ✅ | ✅ |
| Pre/Post Midterm Support | ✅ | ✅ |
| Annual Support | ✅ | ✅ |
| MG/EX Totals | ✅ | ✅ |

## QR Code Data Structure - JSON Schema

```json
{
  "version": "1.0",
  "school": {
    "name": "ECOLE LA FONTAINE",
    "address": "Rubavu, Rwanda",
    "phone": "+250 788 534 320",
    "email": "info@ecolelafontaine.rw",
    "website": "www.ecolelafontaine.rw",
    "logo": "base64_encoded_logo_optional"
  },
  "student": {
    "id": 1,
    "code": "STU-001",
    "firstName": "GANZA",
    "lastName": "KING",
    "dob": "2015-03-15",
    "age": 11,
    "gender": "Male",
    "nationality": "Rwandan",
    "class": "Primary 4A",
    "classId": 4,
    "academicYear": "2025-2026",
    "term": "Term 3",
    "termId": 3,
    "reportType": "endterm",
    "enrollmentDate": "2020-01-15",
    "status": "Active"
  },
  "guardian": {
    "name": "HABIMANA Grace",
    "relationship": "Mother",
    "phone": "+250 788 534 320",
    "email": "grace.habimana@email.com",
    "address": "Kigali, Rwanda",
    "occupation": "Teacher"
  },
  "academics": {
    "term": "Term 3",
    "phase": "post_midterm",
    "subjects": [
      {
        "id": 1,
        "name": "Mathematics",
        "assessments": [
          { "type": "Quiz 1", "score": 48, "max": 50, "pct": 96, "grade": "A+" },
          { "type": "Quiz 2", "score": 45, "max": 50, "pct": 90, "grade": "A+" },
          { "type": "Quiz 3", "score": 47, "max": 50, "pct": 94, "grade": "A+" },
          { "type": "Quiz 4", "score": 50, "max": 50, "pct": 100, "grade": "A+" },
          { "type": "Mid-Term", "score": 42, "max": 50, "pct": 84, "grade": "B+" },
          { "type": "Exam 1", "score": 48, "max": 50, "pct": 96, "grade": "A+" }
        ],
        "mg": 45,
        "ex": 48,
        "total": 93,
        "max": 100,
        "pct": 93,
        "grade": "A+"
      }
    ],

      "mg": 356,
      "ex": 372,
      "grand": 728,

## QR Code Generation & Display Flow

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  🔄 QR CODE GENERATION FLOW                                                                 │
│  ┌───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐   │
│  │                                                                                       │   │
│  │  ┌─────────────────────┐    ┌─────────────────────┐    ┌─────────────────────────┐   │   │
│  │  │  1. Generate        │    │  2. Compress        │    │  3. Encode to QR       │   │   │
│  │  │     JSON Payload    │───▶│     Data            │───▶│     Image              │   │   │
│  │  │     (from DB)       │    │     (Minify)        │    │     (PNG)              │   │   │
│  │  └─────────────────────┘    └─────────────────────┘    └─────────────────────────┘   │   │
│  │         │                           │                           │                   │   │
│  │         ▼                           ▼                           ▼                   │   │
│  │  ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐   │   │
│  │  │  QR CODE PROPERTIES                                                          │   │   │
│  │  │  • Size: 200px × 200px                                                       │   │   │
│  │  │  • Color: #0f2744 (Dark) / #ffffff (Light)                                  │   │   │
│  │  │  • Correction Level: M (15% error recovery)                                 │   │   │
│  │  │  • Max Capacity: ~4,296 characters                                          │   │   │
│  │  └─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘   │   │
│  │                                                                                       │   │
│  │  ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐   │   │
│  │  │  QR CODE OUTPUT                                                               │   │   │
│  │  │  ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐   │   │   │
│  │  │  │                                                                     │   │   │   │
│  │  │  │              ████████████████████████████████                      │   │   │   │

│  │  │  │              ██░░████████░░░░░░████████░░██                      │   │   │   │
│  │  │  │              ██░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░██                      │   │   │   │
│  │  │  │              ██░░████░░░░██░░░░████░░██████                      │   │   │   │

## QR Code Embedding in Report Card

```

## Summary - QR Code Content

| Section | Content | Max Size |
|---------|---------|----------|
| **School Info** | Name, Address, Phone, Email, Website | ~200 chars |
| **Student Info** | Code, Name, DOB, Gender, Class, Year, Term | ~300 chars |
| **Guardian Info** | Name, Phone, Email, Address, Occupation | ~200 chars |
| **Academics** | Subjects with all assessments, MG, EX, Totals | ~2,500 chars |
| **Summary Stats** | Totals, Percentage, Grade, Rank, Status | ~200 chars |
| **Attendance** | Days, Present, Absent, Late, Rate | ~100 chars |
| **Report Card** | Full HTML view with logo, table, promotion | ~1,500 chars |
| **Metadata** | Version, Generated timestamp, Head Teacher | ~100 chars |
| **Total** | | ~5,100 chars |

### QR Code Capacity:
- **Version 40 (177×177)**: 4,296 characters (alphanumeric)
- **Estimated size**: ~200px × 200px
- **Correction Level**: M (15% error recovery)
- **Loading time**: < 100ms

---

## Summary - Modules Overview

| Module | Key Features | Views |
|--------|--------------|-------|
| **Transcripts** | Individual & Batch, GPA, Rank, Attendance | Single, Batch, Summary |
| **Timetables** | Master, Teacher, Conflict Detection | Class, Teacher, Staff |
| **Statistics** | Performance, Trends, Distribution | Summary, Class, Subject |

### New Important Modifications:

1. **Transcripts**:
   - ✅ Batch transcript generation
   - ✅ GPA calculation (4.0 scale)
   - ✅ Cumulative summary across terms
   - ✅ Export to PDF/Excel

2. **Timetables**:
   - ✅ Conflict detection
   - ✅ Teacher-specific view
   - ✅ Room assignment
   - ✅ Break slots (🍎, 🍽️, ☕)

3. **Statistics**:
   - ✅ Trend analysis across terms
   - ✅ Subject performance tracking
   - ✅ Grade distribution
   - ✅ Class ranking

# Academic Reports vs Analytics/Statistics - What's Different?

Great question! Let me clarify the differences and what **Academic Reports** offers that **Analytics** and **Statistics** don't.

## Comparison Overview

| Feature | Analytics | Statistics | Academic Reports |
|---------|-----------|------------|------------------|
| **Purpose** | High-level trends & patterns | Data summaries & metrics | **Formal printed documents** |
| **Output** | Interactive charts | Tables & charts | **PDF/Print-ready documents** |
| **Audience** | Admin, Teachers | Admin, Teachers | **Parents, Students, External** |
| **Format** | Screen view | Screen view | **Paper/PDF with branding** |
| **Detail Level** | Aggregated | Aggregated | **Student-level granular** |

---

## What Academic Reports Has That Analytics/Statistics Don't

### 1. STUDENT-LEVEL DETAILED REPORTS

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐

## Summary: What's Unique to Academic Reports

| Feature | Analytics | Statistics | Academic Reports |
|---------|-----------|------------|------------------|
| **Student-level detail** | ❌ | ❌ | ✅ |
| **Printable PDF format** | ❌ | ❌ | ✅ |
| **School branding** | ❌ | ❌ | ✅ |
| **Teacher comments** | ❌ | ❌ | ✅ |
| **Promotion decisions** | ❌ | ❌ | ✅ |
| **Parent/guardian info** | ❌ | ❌ | ✅ |
| **Formal document structure** | ❌ | ❌ | ✅ |
| **Signature lines** | ❌ | ❌ | ✅ |
| **Batch generation** | ❌ | ❌ | ✅ |
| **Export to PDF** | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ |
| **Export to Excel** | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ |
| **Charts & graphs** | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ |
| **Trends analysis** | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ |

---

## Academic Reports - Additional Features

### 1. Batch Report Generation
- Generate reports for entire class at once
- Export as single PDF or individual files
- Include cover page with school branding

### 2. Report Templates
- Standard report card template
- French version (for Nursery)
- English version (for Primary)
- Custom template support

### 3. Report Settings
- Include/exclude attendance
- Include/exclude teacher comments
- Include/exclude grade distribution
- Set pass mark threshold
- Set promotion criteria

### 4. Distribution
- Print directly
- Email to parents
- Download as PDF
- Archive in system

---

Would you like me to:

1. **Build the Academic Reports** with all these features?
2. **Focus on specific report types** (e.g., Report Cards, Promotion Reports)?
3. **Move on to the next module** (e.g., Settings, Backup)?
4. **Add any additional features** to Academic Reports?

# Academic Reports - Complete ASCII Wireframe

Academic Reports combines the best of **Analytics** (trends, charts) and **Statistics** (aggregated data) but presents it in a **formal, printable, parent-facing format** with school branding, student-level detail, teacher comments, and promotion decisions.

---

---

## Summary - Academic Reports vs Analytics/Statistics

| Feature | Analytics | Statistics | Academic Reports |
|---------|-----------|------------|------------------|
| **Purpose** | Trends & Patterns | Data Summaries | **Formal Documents** |
| **Audience** | Admin/Teachers | Admin/Teachers | **Parents/Students** |
| **Format** | Interactive Charts | Tables | **PDF/Print Ready** |
| **School Branding** | ❌ | ❌ | **✅ Full Branding** |
| **Student Details** | ❌ | ❌ | **✅ Per Student** |
| **Teacher Comments** | ❌ | ❌ | **✅** |
| **Promotion Decision** | ❌ | ❌ | **✅** |
| **Signatures** | ❌ | ❌ | **✅** |
| **QR Codes** | ❌ | ❌ | **✅** |
| **Batch Generation** | ❌ | ❌ | **✅** |
| **Parent Contact Info** | ❌ | ❌ | **✅** |

---

## Your Decision

Would you like me to:

1. **Build the Academic Reports** module with all 6 report types?
2. **Focus on specific report types** (e.g., Report Cards only)?
3. **Start building the code** for any of these reports?
4. **Move on to the next module** (e.g., Settings, Backup)?

## Summary - Finance Dashboard Features

| Feature | Status |
|---------|--------|
| **Key Metrics** | ✅ Total Expected, Collected, Pending, Rate, Overdue, Waived |
| **Collection Trends** | ✅ Monthly bar chart (ASCII) |
| **Collection by Class** | ✅ Bar chart & table with ranking |
| **Recent Payments** | ✅ List with receipt numbers |
| **Overdue Payments** | ✅ List with action buttons |
| **Overdue Severity** | ✅ 4-band breakdown |
| **Payment Method Breakdown** | ✅ Cash, MTN MM, Bank, Cheque |
| **Fee Category Breakdown** | ✅ School Fees, Transport, Activity |
| **Class Finance Details** | ✅ Student-level breakdown |
| **Quick Actions** | ✅ Record Payment, Receipts, Student Fees, etc. |
| **Export** | ✅ Excel, PDF |
| **Filters** | ✅ Term, Class, Category, Date |

4. **Move on to the next module** (e.g., Fee Structure, Record Payment)?

---

## FINANCE DASHBOARD - FEATURES SUMMARY

| Section | Component | Features |
|---------|-----------|----------|
| **Top Bar** | Header | Title, Date, Term, Refresh, Export, Settings |
| **Filters** | Controls | Term, Class, Category, Status, Date Range, Apply, Reset, Save |
| **Key Metrics** | Cards | Total Expected, Collected, Pending, Rate, Overdue, Waived, Today |
| **Charts** | Visualizations | Collection Trends (6 months), Collection by Class |
| **Tables** | Data Tables | Class Collection (Ranked), Recent Payments (10) |
| **Overdue** | Management | Overdue List with Severity, Severity Chart (4 bands) |
| **Breakdowns** | Analytics | Payment Method, Fee Category |
| **Daily Trend** | Chart | Weekly Collection, Daily Totals |
| **YTD** | Trend | Year-to-Date Collection, Projections |
| **Notifications** | Live Feed | Payment Alerts, Overdue Alerts |
| **Quick Actions** | Buttons | Record Payment, Receipts, Student Fees, Fee Structure, Export, Reversal, Bulk, Reports, Waivers, Balances |

---

2. **Focus on specific sections** (e.g., Key Metrics first)?
3. **Move on to the next module** (e.g., Fee Structure)?
4. **Add any additional features** to the Finance Dashboard?

## 2. ADD/EDIT FEE CATEGORY MODAL

│  │  │                                                                                         │ │   │

│  │  │  └───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘  │ │   │
│  │  │                                                                                         │ │   │
│  │  │  ┌───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐  │ │   │
│  │  │  │  Default Amount    [150,000] RWF                                                  │  │ │   │
│  │  │  └───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘  │ │   │

## 7. PAYMENT REVERSAL MODAL

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  ↩️ REVERSE PAYMENT                                                                                 │
│  ┌───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐   │
│  │  ↩️ Reverse Payment — RCP-045                                                          [✕]   │   │
│  │  ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐ │   │
│  │  │                                                                                         │ │   │
│  │  │  ⚠️ WARNING: This action will reverse the payment and cannot be undone!                │ │   │
│  │  │                                                                                         │ │   │
│  │  │  ┌───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐  │ │   │
│  │  │  │  Payment Details:                                                                   │  │ │   │
│  │  │  │  Receipt #:  RCP-045            Date:  26 Jun 2026                                │  │ │   │
│  │  │  │  Student:   GANZA KING          Amount: 50,000 RWF                                │  │ │   │
│  │  │  │  Method:    Cash                Recorded By: Administrator                        │  │ │   │
│  │  │  └───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘  │ │   │
│  │  │                                                                                         │ │   │
│  │  │  ┌───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐  │ │   │
│  │  │  │  Reason for Reversal *                                                             │  │ │   │
│  │  │  │  [▼ Incorrect amount entered ▼]                                                    │  │ │   │
│  │  │  │  ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐  │ │ │   │
│  │  │  │  │  Entered 50,000 RWF but should have been 30,000 RWF.                       │  │ │ │   │
│  │  │  │  └─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘  │ │ │   │
│  │  │  └───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘  │ │   │
│  │  │                                                                                         │ │   │
│  │  │  ┌───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐  │ │   │
│  │  │  │  Effects of Reversal:                                                              │  │ │   │
│  │  │  │  • Student balance will increase by 50,000 RWF                                   │  │ │   │
│  │  │  │  • Fee allocation will be removed                                                │  │ │   │
│  │  │  │  • Receipt will be voided                                                        │  │ │   │
│  │  │  │  • A reversal record will be created for audit                                   │  │ │   │
│  │  │  └───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘  │ │   │
│  │  │                                                                                         │ │   │
│  │  └─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘ │   │
│  │                                                                                               │
│  │  ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐ │   │
│  │  │  [🗑️ Cancel]                                                      [↩️ Confirm Reversal] │ │   │
│  │  └─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘ │   │
│  └───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘   │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

## SUMMARY - FEATURES COMPARISON

| Feature | Fee Structure | Record Payment | Payment History |
|---------|---------------|----------------|-----------------|
| **List View** | ✅ Categories | ✅ Student Search | ✅ All Payments |
| **Add/Edit** | ✅ Categories & Class Amounts | ✅ Full Payment Form | ❌ |
| **Filters** | ✅ Status, Type | ✅ Student, Balance | ✅ Date, Student, Class, Method, Amount |
| **Search** | ✅ Category Search | ✅ Student Search | ✅ Receipt #, Student |
| **Export** | ✅ Excel | ❌ | ✅ Excel, CSV, PDF |
| **Print** | ❌ | ✅ Receipt | ✅ Receipt, List |
| **Reverse** | ❌ | ❌ | ✅ Payment Reversal |
| **Analytics** | ✅ Statistics | ❌ | ✅ Charts, Trends |
| **Bulk Actions** | ✅ Class Amounts | ❌ | ❌ |
| **Credit Management** | ❌ | ✅ Credit Application | ❌ |

# All Receipt Formats - Complete ASCII Wireframes

---

## RECEIPT FORMATS SUMMARY

| Format | Paper Size | Use Case | Features |
|--------|------------|----------|----------|
| **Standard** | A4 (Full Page) | Official records, filing | Full details, signatures, all fields |
| **Thermal** | 80mm | POS, front office | Compact, fast printing, essential info |
| **Compact** | 58mm | Mobile, portable | Minimal, quick reference, mobile |
| **Detailed** | A4 | Auditing, detailed records | Full fee breakdown, all categories |
| **With QR** | A4/Thermal | Digital verification | QR code for authentication |
| **With Barcode** | A4/Thermal | Scanning, tracking | Barcode for system integration |
| **With Guardian** | A4 | Parent copies | Guardian details included |

---

## YOUR DECISION

Would you like me to:

1. **Start building the code** for all receipt formats?
2. **Focus on specific receipt formats** (e.g., Standard and Thermal only)?
3. **Move on to the next module** (e.g., Balances, Carry Forward)?
4. **Add any additional receipt formats**?

## 3. PAYMENT REVERSALS - MAIN VIEW

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  ↩️ PAYMENT REVERSALS MANAGEMENT                                                                   │
│  ┌───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐   │
│  │  ↩️ Payment Reversals                📅 2025-2026    📊 12 Reversals Recorded                  │   │
│  │  [📥 Export] [📊 Analytics] [🔄 Refresh] [⚙️ Settings]                                         │   │
│  └───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘   │

---

## SUMMARY - OVERDUE & REVERSALS FEATURES

| Feature | Overdue Payments | Payment Reversals |
|---------|------------------|-------------------|
| **List View** | ✅ Severity-based | ✅ All reversals |
| **Severity Levels** | ✅ Critical, High, Medium, Recent | ❌ |
| **Bulk Actions** | ✅ Bulk Pay, Bulk Reminders | ❌ |
| **Student Details** | ✅ Full overdue breakdown | ✅ Original payment details |
| **Payment History** | ✅ Per student | ✅ Per reversal |
| **Action History** | ✅ Reminders, Calls | ✅ Audit trail |
| **Export** | ✅ Excel, PDF | ✅ Excel, PDF |
| **Filters** | ✅ Class, Severity, Days | ✅ Date, Reason, Status |
| **Search** | ✅ Student, Guardian, Phone | ✅ Receipt #, Student |
| **Notifications** | ✅ SMS, Email, Push | ✅ Admin, Parent |
| **Settings** | ✅ Severity thresholds | ✅ Rules, Reasons |

---

## YOUR DECISION

Would you like me to:

1. **Start building the code** for Overdue Payments and Payment Reversals?
2. **Focus on one module** (Overdue Payments or Payment Reversals) first?
3. **Move on to the next module** (e.g., Balances, Carry Forward)?
4. **Add any additional features** to either module?

## Your Decision

The Student Balances and Financial Reports modules are complete with all essential features covering:

1. **Student Balances** - Complete balance management with filters, distribution, and quick actions
2. **Financial Reports** - Comprehensive reporting with summaries, breakdowns, and trend analysis
3. **Financial Dashboard** - Overview with key metrics, trends, and alerts
4. **Export Options** - Multiple export formats including Excel, PDF, and print

Would you like me to:
1. **Start building the code** for these modules?
2. **Move on to the next page** (e.g., Analytics Dashboard)?
3. **Add any additional features** you think are missing?

## Teacher Timetable - ASCII Wireframe

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐

## Summary - All Staff Management Modules

| Module | Key Features | Status |
|--------|--------------|--------|
| **👨‍🏫 Staff Management** | Add/Edit/Delete staff, Role management, Status toggle | ✅ |
| **📖 Subjects** | Add/Edit/Delete subjects, Level management, Sorting | ✅ |
| **📌 Teacher Assignments** | Subject assignments, Class teacher role, Overview matrix | ✅ |
| **⭐ Teacher Performance** | Performance metrics, Ranking, Trend analysis | ✅ |
| **🕐 Master Timetable** | Class timetable, Teacher timetable, Conflict detection | ✅ |

### Teacher Assignment Access Control

| Module | Subject Teacher | Class Teacher |
|--------|-----------------|---------------|
| Marks Entry | ✅ Their subjects only | ✅ All subjects in their class |
| Class Register | ❌ | ✅ Their class only |
| Attendance | ❌ | ✅ Their class only |
| Class Timetable | ❌ | ✅ Their class only |
| Student List | ✅ Read only | ✅ Read only |

---

## Your Decision

The Staff Management modules are complete with all essential features covering:

1. **Staff Management** - Complete CRUD operations with roles
2. **Subjects** - Subject management with MG/EX tracking
3. **Teacher Assignments** - Subject and class teacher assignments with matrix view
4. **Teacher Performance** - Performance metrics and ranking
5. **Master Timetable** - Class and teacher timetables with conflict detection

Would you like me to:
1. **Start building the code** for these modules?
2. **Move on to the next page** (e.g., Finance modules)?
3. **Add any additional features** you think are missing?

## Summary - All Settings Modules

| Module | Key Features | Status |
|--------|--------------|--------|
| **🏫 School Settings** | School info, Logo, Report Card settings, Security | ✅ |
| **📅 Academic Calendar** | Term dates, Holidays, Auto-reset rules | ✅ |
| **📆 Academic Years** | Manage years, Clone, Set active | ✅ |
| **🏛️ Class Management** | Class list, Reorder, Capacity, Stats | ✅ |
| **📊 Grading Scale** | Grade levels, Distribution preview, Settings | ✅ |
| **💾 Backup & Restore** | Manual backup, Restore, Auto-schedule, History | ✅ |
| **📋 System Logs** | Log viewer, Filters, Analytics, Export | ✅ |
| **🔌 API Settings** | Connection settings, Database status, Advanced | ✅ |
| **⚙️ System Settings** | General, Theme, Email, System info | ✅ |

---

## Summary - All Import Types

| Import Type | Required Columns | Auto-Generated | Validation Rules |
|-------------|------------------|----------------|------------------|
| **Students** | First Name, Last Name, Class | Student Code | Class must exist, Unique name check |
| **Marks** | Student Code, Score, Assessment | Assessment if missing | Student exists, Score ≤ Max |
| **Payments** | Student Code, Amount, Date | Receipt # | Student exists, Amount > 0 |
| **Teachers** | First Name, Last Name, Username, Password | None | Unique username, Role valid |
| **Subjects** | Name, Code, Level | None | Unique code, Level valid |
| **Families** | Family Code, Guardian Name | None | Unique code, Students valid |
| **Attendance** | Student Code, Date, Status | None | Student exists, Status valid |

---

## Your Decision

The Bulk Import module is complete with all essential features covering:

1. **Multiple Import Types** - Students, Marks, Payments, Teachers, Subjects, Families, Attendance
2. **File Upload** - Excel, CSV support with preview
3. **Validation** - Error detection with suggestions
4. **Import Options** - Skip errors, update existing, create new
5. **Progress Tracking** - Real-time import progress
6. **Results Summary** - Detailed import results
7. **Export Templates** - Download templates for each type
8. **Settings** - Configure default import behavior

Would you like me to:

1. **Start building the code** for the Bulk Import module?
2. **Move on to the next page** (e.g., Bulk Export)?
3. **Add any additional features** you think are missing?

## Summary - All Export Types & Features

| Export Type | Fields | Formats | Use Case |
|-------------|--------|---------|----------|
| **Students** | 12+ fields | Excel, CSV, PDF | Full student registry |
| **Marks** | 10+ fields | Excel, CSV, JSON | Academic data backup |
| **Payments** | 12+ fields | Excel, CSV, PDF | Financial records |
| **Class Register** | Variable | Excel, PDF, HTML | Class performance report |
| **Attendance** | 8+ fields | Excel, CSV | Attendance records |
| **Fee Structure** | 6+ fields | Excel, CSV | Fee configuration |
| **Teachers** | 8+ fields | Excel, CSV | Staff records |
| **Subjects** | 6+ fields | Excel, CSV | Subject catalog |
| **Families** | 12+ fields | Excel, CSV | Family records |
| **Full Backup** | All data | JSON | Complete system backup |

### Export Features
| Feature | Status |
|---------|--------|
| Multiple Export Types | ✅ Included |
| File Format Options | ✅ Included |
| Preview Before Export | ✅ Included |
| Saved Exports | ✅ Included |
| Export History | ✅ Included |
| Filter Configuration | ✅ Included |
| Progress Tracking | ✅ Included |
| Email Notifications | ✅ Included |
| Export Analytics | ✅ Included |
| Storage Management | ✅ Included |
| Bulk Download | ✅ Included |
| Scheduled Exports | ✅ Included |

---

## Your Decision

The Bulk Export module is complete with all essential features covering:

1. **Multiple Export Types** - Students, Marks, Payments, Register, Attendance, Fees, Teachers, Subjects, Families
2. **File Formats** - Excel, CSV, PDF, JSON, HTML
3. **Preview** - See data before exporting
4. **Saved Exports** - Keep frequently used exports
5. **History** - Track all exports
6. **Analytics** - Export usage statistics
7. **Settings** - Configure default export behavior

Would you like me to:
1. **Start building the code** for the Bulk Export module?
2. **Move on to the next page** (e.g., Settings)?
3. **Add any additional features** you think are missing?

## Your Decision

The Staff Management and Settings modules are complete with all essential features covering:

1. **Staff Management** - Full CRUD with role management
2. **Teacher Assignments** - Subject and class teacher assignments
3. **School Settings** - School info, logo, contact details
4. **Academic Settings** - Terms, holidays, calendar
5. **Grading Settings** - Grading scale and pass marks
6. **User Settings** - Session and security
7. **Backup & Restore** - Manual and auto backup
8. **API Settings** - Supabase configuration
9. **System Logs** - Activity monitoring
10. **System Health** - Performance and status monitoring

Would you like me to:

1. **Start building the code** for Staff Management?
2. **Start building the code** for Settings?
3. **Move on to the next page** (e.g., Finance, Reports)?
4. **Add any additional features** you think are missing?
